source: Canonical palette from guidelines/black-cygnet-life-brand-guide.pdf (page 15), confirmed by internal brand notes. Pantone references are available in the PDF.

ocean.usage: Body text (never plain black). Primary dark background.

misty-rose.usage: Primary background. Body text only when on an Ocean background.

candy.usage: Accent only; error states. Never as a background or body text.

sky.usage: Secondary background; success states. Pairs with Ocean or White for text.

white.usage: Primary background. Reversed text colour on Ocean backgrounds.
